title: Daily Summary — 2026-04-29
body:
## Recent Activity

Synced window: 2026-04-28 11:58 UTC to 2026-04-29 11:58 UTC. Signals show 15 issues, 10 PRs, 0 discussions, and 0 commits updated.

Notable activity centered on orchestration, rubrics routing, and runner reliability. PR #20 and PR #15 remain open with recent review/feedback loops; PR #21 remains open after stability fixes and follow-up discussion. Several merged PRs completed smaller route/access/runtime changes.

## Recently Active PRs

- [#20 Make orchestrator explicit via /orchestrate and label route](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/20) — Open. Recent discussion clarified that current behavior makes orchestration a one-shot router, not ongoing orchestration.
- [#15 Add minimal add-rubrics route with dedicated workflow](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/15) — Open. Latest review flagged remaining robustness/doc issues; follow-up fix attempt reported no code changes.
- [#21 Fix GitHub-hosted runner stability issues](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/21) — Open. Addresses checkout collisions, workflow-dispatch schema drift, rubrics timeout, and generated output ignore rules.
- [#12 Build runtime for unsupported responses](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/12), [#16](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/16), [#18](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/18), [#13](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/13), [#11](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/11), [#6](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/6) — Merged during the window.
- [#7 Add auto-running label control for orchestrator handoffs](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/7) — Open with review activity in the synced window.

## Recently Active Issues

- [#19 Redesign the orchestrator system](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/19) — Open; implementation is tracked in PR #20.
- [#9 Add a "add-rubrics" route](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/9) — Open; implementation is tracked in PR #15.
- [#26 Automatically report issues on GitHub](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/26) — Open; discussion refined central failure intake/reporting requirements.
- [#27 Automatically check sepo agent updates](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/27) — Open; triaged as a scheduled update-check action proposal.
- [#28 Add including `dist (and node modules etc)` for the installation skills](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/28) — Open; linked to runner/install stability work in PR #21.
- [#29 Allow point by by feedback](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/29) and [#30 More flexible branching strategy](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/30) — Newly opened.
- Other active synced issues: [#5](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/5), [#8](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/8), [#14](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/14), [#22](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/22), [#23](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/23), [#24](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/24), [#25](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/25). [#10](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/issues/10) was closed.

## Recently Active Discussions

No discussions were present in the synced signal files.

## Follow-ups

1. Decide intended orchestration behavior for PR #20: one-shot explicit routing vs continued orchestrator handoff after downstream actions.
2. Resolve remaining PR #15 review items around rubrics-branch write concurrency, persistence-failure summaries, and prompt schema consistency.
3. Triage newly opened #29 and #30 into actionable implementation plans or link them to existing orchestration/answer-route work.
